Let's install some standard events and then talk about custom events and difference between standard events and custom events and custom conversions. Now let's just talk a little bit about what a standard event is. A standard event is used to track conversions. A conversion is you know basically moving from point A to point B in your funnel so if someone lands on your page and then becomes a lead that is a conversion to a lead right so going from one step to another step is a conversion you can have multiple conversions happening on your page and on your funnels and so each step will be one conversion. Now Facebook is getting giving us some hints here and some help with regards to how to use those events and how to install them on your funnels and very recently Facebook gave this very nice list of events we're getting more and more standard events and also they are divided by an industry so what basically Facebook is doing it's essentially giving us a hint on how to structure our funnel and what events are available for that industry and what is a suggested flow of those events so taking e-commerce as an example you will see that Facebook is telling us that it suggests or tells us that the very common use of the events is as follows so your content search add to wishlist add to cart initiate checkout add payment info purchase and so on so basically as you you will realize this is basically a flow of the journey of your
